✓ serves it · ◐ with conditions · ✕ not served (proven) · ? not verified yet — hover any verdict for the receipt, click to pin it

Notes

Echo cancellation: Wraps Apple's Voice-Processing I/O unit to strip echo (and optionally apply AGC) from mic capture.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of AECAudioStream? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.
